foods_to_avoid_categories: High GI foods; sugary foods; refined carbs
nutrition_limits: glycemic_index < 55; sugar_g < 5 per serving; fiber_g > 3
notes: Focus on low-GI foods; monitor carbohydrate intake; avoid sugary drinks and desserts

foods_to_avoid_categories: High GI foods; sugary foods; irregular eating patterns
nutrition_limits: Consistent carb intake; low GI preferred
notes: Consistent meal timing critical; carb counting essential; work with dietitian

foods_to_avoid_categories: High sodium foods; processed foods; alcohol
nutrition_limits: sodium_mg < 1500/day; saturated_fat < 7g/day
foods_to_prefer: DASH diet foods,fruits,vegetables,whole grains,lean proteins,low-fat dairy
notes: DASH diet recommended; limit alcohol; increase potassium-rich foods

foods_to_avoid_categories: Saturated fat; trans fat; high cholesterol foods; high sodium
nutrition_limits: saturated_fat < 7g; cholesterol < 200mg; sodium < 1500mg
notes: Mediterranean diet beneficial; avoid trans fats completely

foods_to_avoid_categories: High potassium; high phosphorus; high protein; high sodium
nutrition_limits: protein_g < 50g/day; potassium < 2000mg/day; phosphorus < 800mg/day; sodium < 1500mg/day
notes: Requires strict medical supervision; protein needs vary by dialysis status

foods_to_avoid_categories: High purine foods; alcohol; fructose-rich foods
nutrition_limits: purine_mg < 150mg/day; limit fructose; hydration
notes: Avoid organ meats and shellfish; increase water intake to 2-3L/day; limit alcohol

foods_to_avoid_categories: High GI foods; processed foods; dairy (for some); inflammatory foods
nutrition_limits: low GI diet; anti-inflammatory; high fiber
notes: Anti-inflammatory diet; some benefit from low-dairy; insulin resistance management key

foods_to_avoid_categories: Raw goitrogens in large amounts; soy in excess; high-fiber around medication
nutrition_limits: moderate fiber; iodine-sufficient diet
notes: Cook cruciferous vegetables; take medication on empty stomach; avoid soy near medication

foods_to_avoid_categories: Iodine-rich foods; caffeine; stimulants
nutrition_limits: Low iodine diet if radioiodine therapy planned
notes: Reduce iodized salt and seafood; adequate calcium for bone health

foods_to_avoid_categories: Tea/coffee with meals (inhibits absorption); high calcium with iron
nutrition_limits: iron_mg > 18mg/day target; vitamin C with iron
foods_to_prefer: iron-rich foods,vitamin C for absorption,lean meats
notes: Eat vitamin C with iron-rich foods; avoid tea/coffee within 1 hour of meals

foods_to_avoid_categories: All gluten-containing foods; gluten cross-contamination
nutrition_limits: Strictly gluten-free
notes: Strict avoidance required; check all labels; separate cooking utensils needed

foods_to_avoid_categories: High-fiber foods during flare; raw vegetables; spicy foods; alcohol; caffeine
nutrition_limits: Low-residue diet during flare; adequate nutrition
foods_to_prefer: cooked vegetables,low-fiber foods during flare,lean proteins,soft foods
notes: Diet varies by disease phase; during remission increase variety; track trigger foods

foods_to_avoid_categories: Spicy foods; acidic foods; fatty foods; chocolate; caffeine; alcohol
nutrition_limits: Avoid trigger foods; small frequent meals
notes: Eat 3 hours before lying down; elevate head of bed; identify personal triggers

foods_to_avoid_categories: Alcohol; added sugars; saturated fats; refined carbs; fried foods
nutrition_limits: Low sugar; low saturated fat; Mediterranean diet
notes: Weight loss of 5-10% can improve liver health; avoid fructose corn syrup

foods_to_avoid_categories: High calorie foods; high sugar; high fat; processed foods
nutrition_limits: calorie deficit; high fiber; high protein; low GI
notes: Focus on nutrient density; protein satiates; fiber slows absorption; portion control

foods_to_avoid_categories: Excessive sodium (calcium leaching); excessive caffeine; alcohol
nutrition_limits: calcium_mg > 1000mg/day; vitamin_d sufficient; moderate protein
notes: Weight-bearing exercise equally important; adequate vitamin K2; sun exposure for D

foods_to_avoid_categories: Saturated fat; trans fat; dietary cholesterol; refined carbs
nutrition_limits: saturated_fat < 7g; cholesterol < 200mg/day; increase fiber
notes: Soluble fiber reduces LDL; plant sterols helpful; limit trans fats completely

foods_to_avoid_categories: High-iodine foods (during RAI therapy)
nutrition_limits: Low iodine diet during therapy; otherwise balanced
notes: Low iodine diet for 2 weeks before RAI treatment only; resume normal after

foods_to_avoid_categories: Processed meats; alcohol; high-sugar; undercooked foods (during chemo); raw sprouts
nutrition_limits: nutrient-dense; antioxidant-rich; adequate protein; food safety during chemo
notes: Nutritional needs vary by cancer type and treatment stage; work with oncology dietitian

foods_to_avoid_categories: Lactose-containing dairy foods
nutrition_limits: Limit or avoid lactose; use lactase enzyme
notes: Hard aged cheeses often tolerated; fermented dairy like yogurt usually better tolerated
